name: jlc-tools
description: Claude Code plugins for JLCPCB / LCSC component sourcing and KiCad library workflows

plugins.name: jlcpcb-catalog
plugins.description: Query JLCPCB / LCSC parts catalog via the public JSON API. Resolve MPNs to LCSC C-numbers, check Basic-vs-Extended status and stock, fetch datasheets, and source parts by spec.
